name: Magical Bell - Ring For Sex
description:
Have you ever seen those small handbells in some stores? Well, now you have one! But not just any handbell. This one has the power to make anyone you ring it for horny as hell for you!

It doesn't matter if it's your teacher, boss, maid, step-parent, or step-sibling — ring the bell in front of anyone and you will become insatiable!

Simple yet super effective!
creator: Boi
